message:
🌱 Memoize RewardsContext and ThemeContext values (#10046)

RewardsContext:
- Add rewardsRef for stable callback access to current rewards state
- Wrap hasEarnedAction and awardCoins in useCallback via ref pattern
- Convert 4 IIFEs (earnedAchievements, recentEvents, consoleSubmittedOffset,
  mergedTotalCoins) to useMemo for referential stability
- Extract checkAchievements to module-level pure function
- Wrap context value in useMemo with all dependencies

ThemeContext:
- Wrap setTheme in useCallback (only uses stable setThemeId + pure getThemeById)
- Wrap toggleTheme in useCallback with [themeId, systemPrefersDark, lastDarkTheme]
- Wrap context value in useMemo with all dependencies

Continues the context memoization campaign from PRs #10028, #10036, #10042.
Total: 6 context providers now properly memoized.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
